title: task
description: rust/lichen-cli/src/commands.rs:218-223 - The 'key pin' and 'key unpin' commands print success messages ("pinned", "unpinned") but don't actually make any network call or persist any state. Users believe they've secured a key relationship when nothing happened. This can lead to security assumptions being violated - a user thinks they pinned a peer's key to prevent rotation, but the pin was never applied.
